name: smart-customer-service
description: AI-powered smart customer service system with admin panel

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.test: DB_PATH=./data/chat-route-test.db JWT_SECRET=test-secret-123 tsx server/tests/chat-route.test.ts && DB_PATH=./data/regression-test.db JWT_SECRET=test-secret-123 tsx server/tests/knowledge-review.test.ts && tsx server/tests/document-parser.test.ts && tsx server/tests/document-chunker.test.ts && JWT_SECRET=test-secret-123 tsx server/tests/document-rag.test.ts && JWT_SECRET=test-secret-123 tsx server/tests/knowledge-retriever.test.ts && DB_PATH=./data/conversation-lifecycle-test.db JWT_SECRET=test-secret-123 tsx server/tests/conversation-lifecycle.test.ts && tsx server/tests/prompt-knowledge.test.ts && tsx server/tests/intent-classifier.test.ts && tsx server/tests/document-api.test.ts && tsx server/tests/model-config-security.test.ts && tsx server/tests/regression.test.ts && tsc -p server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
